articles.headline: Missile kit lets fighter jets down drones on the cheap
articles.description: Shooting down a drone with a fighter jet is as cost effective as wrapping sandwiches in gold foil, but BAE Systems has cut the price by firing an economy anti-drone Advanced Precision Kill Weapon System (APKWS) missile from a Typhoon Eurofighter.Continue Read…

articles.headline: Typhoon Curling Club punches ticket to inaugural Rock League championship
articles.description: One half of the first-ever Rock League final is set. Typhoon Curling Club beat Northern United in a dramatic first semifinal at Toronto’s Mattamy Athletic Centre on Sunday.

articles.headline: China Is Building A Massive 'Floating Island' That Can Study The Deep Sea In Any Weather
articles.description: It's not uncommon for organizations to have labs set up on large boats, but those boats are limited by weather that typically makes the ocean unsafe.
